results.title: UFC auctions red corner stool from Freedom 250 White House event
results.description: UFC Collectibles is auctioning the red corner stool used throughout Freedom 250, the promotion's White House South Lawn event earlier this month where lightweight champion Ilia Topuria surrendered on the seat between rounds against Justin Gaethje.

results.title: J.J. McCarthy during a June 2026 OTA practice in Eagan, Minnesota.
results.description: If J.J. McCarthy can layer the football and avoid throwing mostly fastballs, maybe he can give Kyler Murray a run for his money in training camp.

results.title: Cole Palmer puts World Cup heartache behind him by jetting off for Ibiza break on Jet2 flight
results.description: COLE Palmer and Jack Grealish put their World Cup heartache behind them by jetting away for sunshine breaks. The millionaire footie stars mingled with holidaymakers, with the Chelsea ace flying to Ibiza on a scheduled flight alongside star-struck flyers. The humble star, 24, controversially axed from the England World Cup squad by boss Thomas Tuchel,...
